title: Orbiting Shipyard Alpha
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Orbiting Shipyard Alpha''' was a [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] circling [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in a wide, oval [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]].

The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] was once repaired in this shipyard.

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''
*<!-- 1998-06-30 -->''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
